text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Let's play "ill omen" today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Fuku was saying something about it when I was by
the shoe lockers! "Signs of ill omen! Pay a visit to
a shrine!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's like, a game or something. I thought it'd be
super cool, so―

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What was that? A cat, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Rice! It's you! What's the matter? Hunched over
'cause you're looking at ants?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no... I came for the shrine, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-No... I just don't want to cause any trouble...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's bad luck to stand next to me, so I figured I
should crouch down like this...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Just this morning, Urara's shoelace came undone,
all because I came to school...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! All of a sudden it went rrrip! and just came apart!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wonder why? That was so funny! It certainly
made for an exciting morning!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? You thought it was... funny?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's go to the shrine together! I'm sure
more funny things'll happen! Isn't that right,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: Only if that's okay with you, Rice!
Only if that's okay with you, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay... Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wish for more funny things to happen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I wish for nothing bad to happen to Urara...
Please!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And... we're done!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooh! My body feels so light!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Rice! It was so fun visiting the shrine with
you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I should be thanking you... Thank you for
inviting me.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't know why, but all right... You're
welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both their worries and cares disappear thanks to
the shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yay! We still have plenty of time! What should we
do next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? That sound...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! The button on my shoe popped off and went flying! That's so funny! ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-it's all my fault! I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems her shoe clasp has broken, but Haru
Urara doesn't pay it any mind or let it dampen her
mood.
